stemHtml: New pilot in the airline has just done his/her checks. Flying with a captain who is commencing his/her line check. The new pilot is in the commander's seat. What is the role of the new pilot on this flight?

options.a: New pilot is a commander because he is in the commander's seat.
options.b: New pilot will be a commander if the operator dedicates him to be.
options.c: The captain commencing a check is a pilot of this flight.
options.d: Both are commanders on this flight.
